title: Principles of Comparative Politics
further_info: Recommended Reading • Caramani, Daniele (Hrsg.) 2023. Comparative Politics. Sixth edition. Oxford: Oxford University Press. • Lauth, Hans-Joachim/Kneuer, Marianne/Pickel, Gert (Hrsg.): Handbuch Vergleichende Politikwissenschaft, Wiesbaden: Springer VS, 2016. • Moller, Jorgen/ Skaaning, Svend-Erik. 2024. Democratization and Autocratization in Comparative Perspective. London and New York: Routledge.
